# Imposia 0.3.1

Imposia 0.3.1 is a patch release that preserves the source document's CSS
cascade in the native browser print snapshot.

## Highlights

- The isolated top-document print host now retains the canonical source
  document's `html` and `body` attributes, body-scoped selectors, and computed
  custom properties. Print and Save to PDF therefore retain styles that depend
  on the source `body` instead of falling back to unstyled snapshot content.
- The public Core `controller.print()` Chromium regression covers the body
  cascade and a body-defined custom property. Viewer, Client, and React share
  the same print path.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @imposia/react@0.3.1
```

Framework-neutral consumers can install the package that matches their layer:

```bash
pnpm add @imposia/core@0.3.1
pnpm add @imposia/viewer@0.3.1
pnpm add @imposia/client@0.3.1
```

## Packages

- [@imposia/core](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@imposia/core)
- [@imposia/viewer](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@imposia/viewer)
- [@imposia/client](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@imposia/client)
- [@imposia/react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@imposia/react)

Each attached `.tgz` is the package tarball submitted to npm. `SHA256SUMS`
records the matching GitHub Release asset checksums.
